news.summary: In April 2025, China's economy demonstrated resilience in the face of growing external challenges, with a noteworthy expansion in exports. A query posed on people.cn inquired about the reasons behind this stability despite the challenging external environment. This showcases the strength of China's economy, with robust economic data pointing towards stability. The question highlights the curiosity surrounding China's economic performance, offering valuable insights into the factors contributing to its steady growth amid global challenges.
news.headline: China's economy remains stable amid external challenges; exports grew rapidly in April despite obstacles.

news.summary: A recent report submitted to the Luxembourg Commission de Surveillance du Secteur Financier (CSSF) discloses significant transactions involving executives and closely linked individuals. Alvogen Lux Holdings S.ár.l., the second largest stakeholder in Alvotech, has confirmed the purchase of 95,000 shares in the company at a rate of ISK 1,260 per share on May 20, 2025. Noteworthy shareholders in Alvogen Lux Holdings include CVC (40%), Aztiq (30%), and Temasek (20%).
news.headline: CSSF filing shows Alvogen Lux Holdings bought 95,000 Alvotech shares at ISK 1,260/share on May 20, 2025, as second largest shareholder. Top 3 shareholders are CVC (40%), Aztiq (30%), and Temasek (20%).

news.summary: Ralph Lauren Corporation (NYSE: RL) posted strong fourth-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations. The luxury fashion brand achieved a noteworthy 8% year-on-year sales increase, reaching $1.70 billion, compared to the anticipated $1.64 billion. The adjusted earnings per share (EPS) of $2.27 also exceeded estimates of $2.00. Patrice Louvet, the President and CEO, shared optimism for Fiscal 2026, highlighting their focus on expanding growth opportunities in various lifestyle categories, regions, and distribution channels. The company aims for around single-digit revenue growth in constant currency terms moving forward, emphasizing adaptability and financial stability amidst global economic uncertainties.
news.headline: Ralph Lauren's Q4 sales grew 8% to $1.70 billion, beating estimates. Adjusted EPS was $2.27 compared to estimated $2.00. CEO optimistic about future growth strategies.

news.summary: In the city of Onalaska, Wisconsin, on May 23, 2025, Innovia Consulting, a top partner for Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central, has revealed the merger of Lloyd Business IT Solutions. This Ontario, Canada-based company is well-regarded for its Microsoft Dynamics services. This merging of the two entities signifies a significant development in the industry as Innovia strengthens its market presence and expands its services.
news.headline: Innovia Consulting acquires Lloyd Business IT Solutions NAV Operations, expanding Microsoft Dynamics presence in Canada.

This special release commemorates PATH's 4th anniversary and showcases a vibrant homage to summer, sustainability, and American manufacturing. news.headline: PATH launches Limited Edition MUSA Bottle, celebrating 4th anniversary. Made in USA, transforms into American flag.

(referred to as "DIAGNOS") operating under the stock symbols TSX Venture: ADK, OTCQB: DGNOF, FWB: 4D4A, known for its innovative approach in early identification of significant health concerns through cutting-edge Artificial Intelligence (AI) technology, disclosed the hiring of Allele Capital Partners, LLC ("Allele") to render capital market counseling and social media aid to the Corporation.
news.headline: "DIAGNOS partners with Allele Capital for advisory services and social media; advancing health with AI. (TSX: ADK, OTCQB: DGNOF, FWB: 4D4A) #HealthTech"

news.summary: BJ's Wholesale Club Holdings, Inc. shared their first-quarter results, revealing an adjusted earnings per share of $1.14, surpassing the anticipated 92 cents as per analysts. The company brought in quarterly revenues of $5.15 billion, showing a 4.7% increase compared to last year, although falling short of the expected $5.20 billion. Chairman and CEO Bob Eddy expressed satisfaction with their performance, highlighting the success in their growth strategies and commitment to providing excellent value to customers. The team's dedication to supporting families during these times was also acknowledged. For more details, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: BJ's Wholesale Club reported Q1 earnings per share of $1.14, beating estimates, with revenues of $5.15 billion (+4.7% YoY). Analysts raise forecasts. CEO highlights strong start to the year.

news.summary: LICT Corporation, traded as LICT (OTC Pink®), released its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. Total revenues saw a $1.1 million increase, reaching $34.6 million. This marks a 3.3% rise from the $33.5 million recorded in the same period of 2024. Non-regulated revenues for Q1 2025 went up by $900,000, hitting $19.4 million, a 4.9% increase from the $18.5 million reported in the previous year's first quarter. The surge was attributed to higher sales in a specific product line.
news.headline: LICT Corp's Q1 2025 revenues rose to $34.6M, up $1.1M from Q1 2024, with non-regulated revenues up 4.9% to $19.4M.

Larsen to the Boards of Directors of PG&E Corporation and its subsidiary, Pacific Gas and Electric Company. This decision was made during the Annual Meetings of Shareholders held on May 22, 2025.
news.headline: John O. Larsen joins PG&E Corporation and its subsidiary Pacific Gas and Electric Company boards of directors.

news.summary: In New York on May 23, 2025, Bitcoin expert and investor Mark Moss collaborated with top Bitcoin lender Arch Lending to introduce Velocity by Arch. This new segment provides exclusive wealth-building resources tailored for long-term Bitcoin investors. It guarantees institutional-level security and no costs associated with transactions.
news.headline: Mark Moss partners with Arch Lending to launch Velocity, offering wealth-building tools to Bitcoin holders.

GEM holds a staggering inventory of over 15 million pieces.
news.headline: Hard Rock International acquires majority stake in Globe Entertainment and Media Corp, with over 15 million rare images and collectibles.

news.summary: A recent report shows that the global carbon emissions have reached a record high of 36.8 billion metric tons in 2021, marking a 6% increase from the previous year. This surge in emissions is driven by the rebound in economic activities following the COVID-19 pandemic. The data also reveals that China remains the top emitter with 10.3 billion metric tons, followed by the United States with 5.9 billion metric tons. Despite various efforts to reduce carbon emissions, the numbers indicate a concerning trend of rising global emissions that could further exacerbate climate change. Experts emphasize the urgent need for more significant and immediate actions to combat this growing threat.
news.headline: Assystem announced the voting results and dividend for FY 2024 at its General Meeting on May 23, 2025. #finance #Assystem

news.summary: Retailer Ross Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ: ROST) reported strong quarterly results, surpassing expectations. The company's earnings stood at $1.47 per share, exceeding the estimated $1.44, with revenue totaling $4.99 billion, above the anticipated $4.97 billion. However, their second-quarter EPS forecast fell short, ranging between $1.40 to $1.55, compared to the projected $1.65. Despite a slow start in February, sales improved steadily throughout the quarter. CEO Jim Conroy highlighted the strong performance of sales and earnings during the period, with an operating margin of 12.2%, consistent with the previous year. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Ross Stores beat Q1 earnings estimates with $1.47 EPS and $4.99 billion revenue. However, Q2 EPS guidance is below expectations. CEO optimistic.

news.summary: In 2025, commercial property and casualty (P&C) insurance organizations in Chicago are focusing on digital transformation and on-the-job training. According to the recent Convr Insurance Talent and Tech Trends survey, 200 P&C insurance companies are prioritizing these areas.
news.headline: Commercial P&C insurance industry leaders focused on digital transformation and training in 2025, revealed in survey of 200 organizations by Convr.

news.summary: In Halifax, Nova Scotia, Emera Inc. (TSX: EMA) revealed the outcome of its Annual Meeting of Shareholders on May 22, 2025. Through a ballot vote, all 12 Director nominees listed in the Management Information Circular from March 19, 2025, were successfully elected. The breakdown of votes for Director election is as follows: Scott C. Balfour received 142,556,068 votes in favor, representing 99.68% of the total votes, with 450,675 votes withheld.
news.headline: Emera Inc. elects 12 directors at Annual Meeting of Shareholders on May 22, 2025, with Scott C. Balfour receiving 99.68% of votes for.

news.summary: A recent report "Wind Power Market in India (2025-2030)" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. As of FY 2024, India had a cumulative installed wind power capacity of 48.16 GW, and it is projected to increase to 89.49 GW by FY 2030. This represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 11.26% during the period from 2025 to 2030. The market in India is centered around the generation, installation, and distribution of electricity through wind power technology.
news.headline: India's wind power market sees growth, with 48.16 GW capacity in FY 2024, expected to reach 89.49 GW by FY 2030, CAGR of ~11.26%.

news.summary: Alchemy, a Web3 developer platform, has acquired HeyMint, a California-based NFT launchpad, to enhance its smart wallet infrastructure. The undisclosed funding deal includes embedding HeyMint's infrastructure within Alchemy to simplify user onboarding for Web3 applications. HeyMint attracted over 1 million users and facilitated $38 million in NFT sales, supporting major brands like The Sandbox, Universal Music Group, and Ubisoft. In 2023, HeyMint supported NFT sales for the Partnership for Central America, involving Mastercard. Alchemy's second funding deal this month was acquiring Dexter Lab, a Solana data infrastructure provider. Meanwhile, the crypto market is experiencing increased M&A activity, like Robinhood's $179 million purchase of WonderFi, and Coinbase's $2.9 billion acquisition of Deribit. The market shows promising signs for more M&As in 2025, with increased VC funding in the crypto space.
news.headline: Alchemy acquires HeyMint NFT launchpad for undisclosed sum; 1M+ users, $38M NFT sales; 2nd deal in May after Dexter Lab. Regulatory clarity boosts US crypto M&A, 2025 expected to see increased activity; Recent top M&A include Robinhood's WonderFi acquisition for $179M, Coinbase's Deribit acquisition for $2.9B; Ripple buys Hidden Road for $1.25B to expand institutional finance. Crypto VC funding rising despite deal decline; Value doubles compared to previous year.

news.summary: Renowned artists such as HYBYCOZO, Whitaker Studio, and This is Loop are set to showcase their work at the upcoming Mojave Desert festival from October 3rd to 5th, 2025. The event, marking the 10th anniversary of the RISE Festival, will take place in Las Vegas. This year's event is expected to draw a large crowd, with attendees looking forward to experiencing the unique art installations and performances by various talented artists.
news.headline: 10th anniversary of RISE Festival in Mojave Desert on Oct 3-5, 2025, with 'The Path' experience and art by artists like HYBYCOZO and Whitaker Studio.

news.summary: Intuit Inc. reported strong third-quarter financial results with revenue of $7.75 billion, beating analyst estimates of $7.56 billion. The adjusted earnings were $11.65 per share, surpassing analyst predictions of $10.91 per share. The CEO mentioned exceptional momentum and the company's focus on AI to drive success for consumers and businesses. For the fourth quarter, Intuit anticipates revenue of $3.72 billion to $3.76 billion and adjusted earnings of $2.63 to $2.68 per share. Full-year guidance was raised, with revenue expected to reach $18.72 billion to $18.76 billion and earnings projected at $20.07 to $20.12 per share.
news.headline: Intuit (NASDAQ: INTU) reported Q3 revenue of $7.75 billion, beating estimates of $7.56 billion. Adjusted earnings were $11.65 per share, surpassing estimates of $10.91 per share. Q4 revenue expected at $3.72 to $3.76 billion, adjusted earnings $2.63 to $2.68 per share. Full-year 2025 revenue guidance raised to $18.72 to $18.76 billion. CEO cites exceptional momentum and AI capabilities driving success.

news.summary: In Bangalore, India, on May 23, 2025, it was reported that the Direct Air Capture Device Market is categorized by type into Liquid Adsorption and Solid Adsorption, with applications in Food and Beverage, Greenhouse, Energy, and Fuel sectors. The market for these devices reached a value of USD 25.9 million in 2024.
news.headline: Direct Air Capture Device market growing at 76.8% CAGR with USD 25.9M value in 2024. Surging demand in energy, food, and greenhouse apps.
